PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?winner ?winnerLabel ?seasonStart WHERE {
  ?season wdt:P3450 wd:Q324867 ; wdt:P1346 ?winner ; wdt:P580 ?seasonStart .
  ?winner rdfs:label ?winnerLabel .
  FILTER(lang(?winnerLabel) = 'en')
  .
  FILTER(YEAR(?seasonStart) >= 2014)
  .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?seasonStart)
LIMIT 10

Index types used:
- "embedding": Retrieves items by cosine similarity between their embeddings and the query embedding. The embedding model used depends on the index and may support text, images, or both.
- "fuzzy": Retrieves items by overlap between their label words and the query keywords. The query keywords must not match label words exactly, but some fuzziness is allowed. PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT ?winner ?winnerLabel ?seasonStart
WHERE {
  ?season wdt:P3450 wd:Q324867;  # season is an edition of La Liga
         wdt:P1346 ?winner;        # winner of the season
         wdt:P580 ?seasonStart.     # start time of the season
  ?winner rdfs:label ?winnerLabel.
  FILTER (lang(?winnerLabel) = "en")
  FILTER (YEAR(?seasonStart) >= 2014)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?seasonStart)
LIMIT 10
